params.encAmount: Encrypted amount of tokens to list.
params.encMinReceive: Encrypted minimum payment the seller will accept.
params.quoteToken: The confidential token accepted as payment (e.g. cUSDC).

cancelListing(uint256).notice: Seller cancels and retrieves locked tokens.

createListing(address,address,uint256,ui.notice: Seller escrows encrypted stableETH/upETH and sets an encrypted minimum price.

fill(uint256,bytes32,bytes32,bytes,bytes.notice: Buyer submits encrypted payment and expected receive amount.         Contract verifies match via FHE. If both conditions hold, swap executes.         Otherwise, full refund to both — nothing about terms is leaked. Match conditions (evaluated in FHE):   C1: buyerPayment >= seller.minReceive   C2: seller.lockedAmount >= buyerExpected If C1 && C2:   buyer receives min(lockedAmount, expected) tokens   seller receives min(payment, minReceive) quote tokens   excess refunded to respective parties
